name: Colony receipt benchmark scenarios
description: Deterministic coordination scenarios for comparing standard prompt-heavy agent loops with Colony MCP receipt flows.

scenarios.title: Cross-agent handoff
scenarios.description: One agent transfers branch, task, blocker, next step, and evidence to another agent.

scenarios.title: Parallel edits
scenarios.description: Three agents check file ownership, claim disjoint paths, and avoid duplicate scans.

scenarios.title: Resume after quota
scenarios.description: A rescuer resumes an expired lane from structured relay state instead of rebuilding context from logs.
